description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8 Docker image and runs a before_script to update apt, install apt-transport-https, add the sbt repository, import its GPG key, install sbt, and verify the sbt version. Define a single stage called test. Add a test job named test in the test stage that executes the sbt clean coverage test coverageReport command. No services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are required.
